name: Grave Caller
tips: Grave Caller's activated ability costs 0 mana — you can buff a target's attack by your Dark Matter stacks every turn for free.
As both a Mage and Undead, Grave Caller benefits from Dark Matter buffs (Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash) and can be summoned via Reanimated Bones transform (3 mana).
Use the DM buff on your biggest threat each turn. Buffing a Giant Rat or Ratchanter with +5🗡️ per turn snowballs quickly.
At range 1, Grave Caller can attack from the second row while staying protected. Pair this with its 0-cost ability to contribute both damage and buffs each turn.
Getting Grave Caller onto the board via Reanimated Bones (1+3 = 4 mana split across turns) is more flexible than hard-casting for 4 mana in one turn.
rulings: The activated ability is a single-target BUFF_ATTACK with scale_with=dark_matter and amount=0. The target gains Grave Caller's DM stacks as bonus 🗡️.
At Grave Caller DM=0, the ability executes cleanly but the +🗡️ is 0 — use Shady Trade Deal / Dark Matter Stash to stack DM on Grave Caller first.
ACTIVATE_ABILITY counts as your one action for the turn — you cannot activate AND attack in the same turn.
Target can be any minion on the board — ally or enemy (picking an enemy is almost never useful, but legal).
